rolling_window_use: High-weight Game 4 input. Game 3 validated NYK road control, Brunson closer leverage, rebounding edge, and the deweighting of PHI early heater stretches. Use as primary Game 4 forecast anchor over Game 1 blowout noise.
forward_model_notes: NYK second-chance and defensive rebounding advantage remains live even with OG Anunoby out.
PHI first-quarter scoring bursts are dangerous but should be deweighted if driven by single-player shooting variance.
Embiid active status does not automatically upgrade PHI unless mobility and rebounding control improve.
Brunson closeout usage remains the primary late-game margin-expansion trigger.
